decision.chatProvider: Héctor Base through open models and local rules

adversarialGates: open-model failure is visible and does not invoke OpenAI
deep deliberation uses open-model architect, adversary and judge passes
knownTradeoffs: open models may be materially less capable than the prior external chat model on some tasks
interactive chat has no live web search after this policy
complex requests may be slower when open-model deliberation uses several passes
the custom Qwen adapter remains unpromoted and the current Qwen endpoint may still use base weights

rollback.strategy: revert this policy commit and restore the prior provider and planned-response implementations
